data_science.title: Understanding Self-Supervised Learning via Latent Distribution Matching
data_science.why_trending: Provides unified theoretical framework explaining diverse SSL methods (contrastive, non-contrastive, predictive) through latent distribution matching—a major step toward understanding self-supervised learning fundamentals.

data_science.title: PerFlow: Physics-Embedded Rectified Flow for Efficient Reconstruction and Uncertainty Quantification of Spatiotemporal Dynamics
data_science.why_trending: Combines physics-embedded diffusion models with sparse PDE reconstruction and uncertainty quantification, addressing key challenges in scientific ML and generative modeling for spatiotemporal dynamics.

data_science.title: Stochastic Schrödinger Diffusion Models for Pure-State Ensemble Generation
data_science.why_trending: Extends diffusion models to quantum pure-state ensembles with well-defined reverse-time samplers—a novel contribution at the intersection of quantum ML and generative modeling.

data_science.title: Flow Matching on Symmetric Spaces
data_science.why_trending: Develops flow matching on Riemannian symmetric spaces (spheres, hyperbolic spaces, Grassmannians), linearizing geodesic handling and extending generative models to non-Euclidean manifolds.

data_science.title: SURE-RAG: Sufficiency and Uncertainty-Aware Evidence Verification for Selective Retrieval-Augmented Generation
data_science.why_trending: Addresses evidence verification gap in RAG systems through transparent aggregation of sufficiency signals, improving practical reliability of LLM-based retrieval systems.

finance.title: ForesightFlow: An Information Leakage Score Framework for Prediction Markets
finance.why_trending: ForesightFlow introduces an Information Leakage Score framework for detecting informed trading on decentralized prediction markets—timely given recent insider-trading scrutiny on Polymarket.

finance.title: Single-Period Portfolio Selection via Information Projection
finance.why_trending: Uses information-theoretic lens to decompose CRRA portfolio returns into Rényi divergence and entropy components, connecting risk aversion to divergence order with operational clarity.

finance.title: Scaling Limits of Bivariate Nearly-Unstable Hawkes Processes and Applications to Rough Volatility
finance.why_trending: Proves functional limit theorems for nearly-unstable bivariate Hawkes processes with heterogeneous heavy tails, advancing rough volatility modeling with realistic multi-scale dynamics.

finance.title: Deepening the Secondary Market: Integrating Trade Credit into Market Clearing with the Cycles Protocol
finance.why_trending: Cycles Protocol integrates trade credit into post-trade settlement via distributed clearing without novation, addressing critical infrastructure gap in secondary market liquidity.

finance.title: SBCA: Cross-Modal BERT-driven Actor-Critic for Multi-Asset Portfolio Optimization
finance.why_trending: Cross-modal BERT-driven actor-critic (SBCA) fuses price time-series and financial text sentiment for portfolio optimization with practical trading constraints, advancing multi-modal DRL.
topics: Deep reinforcement learning for portfolio allocation

social_sciences.title: Doubly Robust Instrumented Difference-in-Differences
social_sciences.why_trending: Develops doubly robust estimators for local average treatment effects under staggered instrument exposure, extending causal inference tools critical for modern program evaluation.

social_sciences.title: Did US Worker Retraining Reduce Participant Automation Exposure?
social_sciences.why_trending: Analyzes 23M WIOA participation records with novel Retrainability Index measuring automation exposure reduction, finding programs primarily deliver wage catch-up rather than task switching.

social_sciences.title: Going Public: Communication in Collective Decisions
social_sciences.why_trending: Proves public communication is weakly dominant over private messaging in principal-agent collective decision settings, with linear payoffs yielding near-deterministic implementation.

social_sciences.title: What Jobs Can AI Learn? Measuring Exposure by Reinforcement Learning
social_sciences.why_trending: Measures AI task-learnability via reinforcement learning post-training rather than current capability overlap, reclassifying occupational automation exposure with forward-looking lens.

social_sciences.title: Estimating peer effects in noisy, low-rank networks via network smoothing
social_sciences.why_trending: Proposes network smoothing for peer effect estimation in noisy, low-rank networks, reducing measurement error bias critical for studying social influence and spillovers.

topics.name: Self-supervised learning theory and representation learning
topics.summary: Theoretical foundations and practical advances in self-supervised learning, including latent distribution matching frameworks, convex set parametrization, and information plane analysis of learned representations.

topics.name: Physics-informed generative models and uncertainty quantification
topics.summary: Generative and flow-based models incorporating physical constraints for PDE-governed fields, with emphasis on efficient uncertainty quantification and stochastic variational methods.

topics.name: Generative models on manifolds and geometric deep learning
topics.summary: Diffusion and flow matching models on non-Euclidean geometric structures (quantum manifolds, symmetric spaces, cumulative flow maps), extending generative modeling beyond Euclidean domains.

topics.name: LLM grounding, reasoning control, and retrieval systems
topics.summary: Methods for evaluating and controlling LLM reasoning over structured data (graphs, evidence, ethical frameworks) and workspace tasks, addressing reliability and interpretability in LLM applications.

topics.name: Causal inference, econometrics, and program evaluation
topics.summary: Advanced econometric methods for causal identification including doubly robust estimators, peer effects in noisy networks, measurement error handling, and uncertainty quantification in forecast comparisons.

topics.name: Prediction markets, informed trading, and market microstructure
topics.summary: Information leakage detection frameworks for decentralized prediction markets, systematic evaluation of trading signals, and detection of insider trading via deadline-resolved and order-flow analysis.

topics.name: Portfolio optimization and deep reinforcement learning for finance
topics.summary: Modern approaches to portfolio selection using information theory, multi-modal deep RL, decision-focused learning, and risk-aware optimization under uncertainty and constraints.

topics.name: Stochastic volatility, Hawkes processes, and rough volatility
topics.summary: Advanced models of asset price dynamics including nearly-unstable Hawkes processes, rough volatility, Bachelier approximations, and Volterra-based stochastic control.

topics.name: Labor economics, automation exposure, and workforce retraining
topics.summary: Measurement of AI-driven automation exposure through task learnability indices, evaluation of retraining program effectiveness, and economic implications of rising negative earnings and demand-shifting investment.

topics.name: Economic theory, mechanism design, and decision making
topics.summary: Foundational advances in mechanism design (communication regimes, delegated lending), behavioral economics (conformity, complexity), and equilibrium theory with strategic interactions and information asymmetries.
